message:
🌱 Add traefik: Let's Encrypt: use ACME API V2 mission (#1630)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-2674-let-s-encrypt-use-acme-api-v2",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: Let's Encrypt: use ACME API V2",
+    "description": "Let's Encrypt: use ACME API V2. Requested by 67+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current traefik deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your traefik version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nhelm list -n traefik 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working traefik installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review traefik configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik\n```\n### Do you want to request a *feature* or report a *bug*?\n\nFeature\n### What did you do?\n\nUsing ACME to generate certificate for all of mine (sub)domains.\n### What did you expect to see?\n\nOne certificate per domain."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Let's Encrypt: use ACME API V2",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?\n\nThis PR allows Træfik to use the new ACME version.\nIt uses the new [lego branch](https://github.com/xenolf/lego/tree/acmev2/acmev2) to access to the ACME V2 API.\n\nACME V2 API main features : \n\n- Suppression of `TLS-SNI-01` challenge\n- Adding **wildcard certificates** generation with `DNS-02` challenge\n\n### Motivation\n\nFix #2674 \n\nAllowing users to do ACME wildcard certificates\n\n### More\r\r\n\n### Additional Notes\n\n- For the moment, wildcard domains can only be defined\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade traefik to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade traefik:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade traefik traefik/traefik --namespace traefik\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik\nhelm list -n traefik\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Let's Encrypt: use ACME API V2\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What does this PR do?\n\nThis PR allows Træfik to use the new ACME version.\nIt uses the new [lego branch](https://github.com/xenolf/lego/tree/acmev2/acmev2) to access to the ACME V2 API.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "traefik",
+      "community",
+      "ingress",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "traefik"
+    ],

+    },

+  },
